title: Updated patches to add context (#2660).
body:
This is a new branch/pull for (#2660) based off initial patches in (#2668).

Left to do:

- [x] update bin/verilator and Changes documentation
- [x] update examples/
      examples/make_tracing_c/sim_main.cpp was updated to use Verilated::time()
      should it also show how to create a VerilatedContext and use that?
- [x] update include/verilated_cov
- [x] Fix v4make test_regress/t/t_wrapper_context.pl  --vlt
      Test currently fails due to the tracing code getting called with flush from different
      thread.  Perhaps we should add a muxex around flush to allow calling it from any thread?
      @gezalore any thoughts?
- [x] Do we need VerilatedInitializer-like setup()/teardown() handling for Verilated?
    for VerilatedContext? @yTakatsukasa any thoughts
- [x] @andreaskuster give this a try in your use case (realizing tracing is still broken).
- [x] Make exit() on $stop optional
